hooks.command: P=$(printf '%s' "${prompt}" | head -c 500); [ ${#P} -gt 20 ] && mm search "$P" --top-k 3 --format context 2>>/tmp/mm-hook.log || true

FP="${tool_input.file_path}"; case "$FP" in *.md|*.py|*.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.go|*.rs|*.rb|*.java|*.kt|*.swift|*.c|*.cpp|*.h|*.hpp|*.sh|*.toml|*.yaml|*.yml|*.json) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; case "$FP" in */node_modules/*|*/dist/*|*/build/*|*/target/*|*/.next/*|*/.nuxt/*|*/__pycache__/*|*/.git/*|*/.venv/*|*/venv/*|*/coverage/*|*/.cache/*) exit 0 ;; esac; mm index "$FP" 2>>/tmp/mm-hook.log || true
